name: Jewelry Bonney - P-085 (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [On Play] If your Leader has the "Supernovas" type and the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards, add up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-up.
